َ: (as the object being verified in إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ)

22:64:11.m: The Absolutely Self-sufficient One (subject of the sentence)

22:64:12.m: the praiseworthy (a name/attribute of اللَّهَ - Allah)

22:65:1.m: did not? (expecting 'yes, it did' as answer)

22:65:2.m: you see (after أَلَمْ: do you not see?)

22:65:6.m: for you all (object of سَخَّرَ - subjected)

22:65:22.m: by His permission (showing how something happens with Allah's approval)

22:65:23.m: indeed (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ)

22:65:24.m: Allah (as the object being described as رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ - Kind, Merciful)

َ: (as the object being described as رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ - Kind, Merciful)

22:65:26.m: truly very kind and gentle (describing اللَّهَ)

22:66:1.m: and He (who gives life and death)

22:66:3.m: he gave life to you all

22:66:5.m: he causes you all to die

22:66:6.m: then, next, afterward (shows sequence of events)

ثُمَّ: then, next, afterward (shows sequence of events)

22:66:7.m: He gives life to you all (subject of هُوَ)

22:67:2.m: a community (possessed by لِّكُلِّ - for every)

22:67:3.m: we made/set (connected to مَنسَكًا - a ritual/rite)

22:67:4.m: a place of ritual (object of جَعَلْنَا)

22:67:8.m: they should surely dispute with you

22:67:11.m: and call out! (connecting to فَلَا يُنٰزِعُنَّكَ - so do not let them dispute with you)

22:67:13.m: your Lord (the one calling to اللَّهِ)

22:67:17.m: a straight path (description of هُدًى - guidance)

22:68:1.m: and if (connects condition about arguing to previous statement)

22:68:3.m: then say! (responding to if they argue)

22:69:5.m: the resurrection (in relation to يَوْمَ - Day of)

22:70:5.m: he knows (what is in السَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)

22:70:11.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to what's written in كِتٰبٍ)

22:70:15.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to what Allah knows)

22:71:7.m: he sends down repeatedly (negated by لَمْ)

22:71:9.m: any authority (object of يُنَزِّلْ - send down)

22:72:12.m: they almost do something (referring to the disbelievers who are about to attack those who recite Allah's verses)

22:72:15.m: they recite (referring to those who disbelieve)

22:72:17.m: our signs (object of تُتْلَىٰ - being recited)

22:72:19.m: so shall I inform you all?

22:72:24.m: he promised her (referring to النار/the Fire)

22:73:3.m: was struck/given (as an example to مَثَلٌ)

22:73:27.m: the seeker (subject of ضَعُفَ - became weak)

22:74:2.m: they measured/estimated correctly (subject of negation ما)

22:74:5.m: His true measure/worth (referring to Allah's worth)

22:74:7.m: Allah (the one true God being acted upon)

22:76:2.m: that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)

22:76:3.m: between (what is in front of them)

22:76:10.m: the matters, the affairs (subject of تُرْجَعُ)

22:77:2.m: those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)

22:77:3.m: they believed (referring to the believers being addressed)

22:77:5.m: and bow down! (command to many people)

22:77:8.m: and do! (command to a group) (followed by ٱلْخَيْرَ - the good)

22:77:10.m: perhaps you all (expressing hope that you will succeed)

22:78:15.m: the religion (as object of اتَّبِعُوا - follow)

22:78:17.m: Abraham (as the object of مِلَّةَ - religion/way)

22:78:20.m: the ones who submit (to Allah) (object of سَمَّىٰكُمُ - He named you)

22:78:24.m: this (pointing to something in this ayah)

هٰذَا: this (pointing to something in this ayah)

22:78:25.m: so that he may be (connected to الرَّسُولُ شَهِيدًا - the messenger being a witness)

22:78:27.m: a witness (object of لِيَكُونَ - so that he may be)

22:78:29.m: and you all may become (witnesses on people)

22:78:41.m: and how excellent! (connected to مَوْلَىٰكُمْ - your protector)

22:78:42.m: the protector (subject of نِعْمَ - how excellent)
